steps.title: Use the cylinder volume formula
steps.content: A cylinder's volume is $V=\pi r^2h$. The diameter is $22$ cm, so the radius is $11$ cm, and the height is $6$ cm.

steps.title: Identify the radius and height
steps.content: From a diameter of 22 cm, the radius is $r = 22 \div 2 = 11$ cm. The height is $h = 6$ cm.

steps.title: Apply the cylinder volume formula
steps.content:
Substitute $r = 11$ and $h = 6$ into the cylinder volume formula:
$$V = \pi (11)^2 (6)$$
$$V = \pi \cdot 121 \cdot 6$$
$$V = 726\pi$$
That is the correct answer.
